title: Calpers Unfazed by Software Stress in Private Credit, CEO Says
description: The largest US public pension isn’t fazed about tremors in the private credit market driven by artificial intelligence’s potential threat to software, according to its chief executive officer, Marcie Frost.
content: The largest US public pension isn’t fazed about tremors in the private credit market driven by artificial intelligence’s potential threat to software, according to its chief executive officer, Marcie Frost.
